_comment: INSMarketplace V2-bound instance, deployed to Igra L2 mainnet on 2026-05-02. Same contract as the V1-bound instance — the contract's `registry` is `IERC721Min immutable`, so swapping registries needs a fresh deploy. Owns/charges are identical: 2% seller fee, 1% featured upfront, 5% hard fee cap, pause kill-switch.
deployer_status: QUARANTINED — drained to Safe immediately after the RR deploy in the same broadcast batch; key file moved to ~insdapp/.foundry-keys/_quarantine/USED-2026-05-02-v2-mkt-rr-deployer-...DO-NOT-REUSE.json
owner_kind: Safe multisig (same Safe as every other INS contract)

rollout_status.note: Used by V2 NFTs only — V2 holders' ListForSaleButton routes here automatically based on registryVersion. V1 NFTs continue listing on the original V1-bound Marketplace (0xde8df276...3642a).
